title: Ek Ladki Ko Dekha To Aisa Laga

lines.lyrics: Hoo ekk ladkii ko dekha toh aaisa lagaa
lines.indian: Sa': .Sa' Sa' Ni: Sa' Re' Ni: Sa' Re' Ni: Sa' Re' Ni Sa':

lines.lyrics: Ekk ladkii ko dekha toh aaisa lagaa
lines.indian: Sa' Sa' Ni: Sa' Re' Ni: Sa' Re' Ni: Sa' Re' Ni Sa':
Sa' Sa' Ni Sa' Pa Ni Dha
Ni Sa' Ni Sa' Pa Ni Dha
Ni Sa' Ni Sa' Pa Ni Dha
Dha Dha Ga ma Dha Pa Pa
Dha Dha Ga ma Dha Pa Pa
Dha Dha ma Dha Sa' Dha Pa
Pa Pa Pa Ni Sa' Ga' Re': Re' Re'
Pa Ni Sa' Ga' Re': .Sa'
